metadata.preview:
# Schema parser correction chain
session_id: schema_parser_session
title: Schema parser correction chain

## message schema_fact_1
Early note, later superseded: trim the whole schema header before tokenization.

## message schema_fact_2
Correction: tokenize first, then trim each field. This preserves raw delimiter and quoted-field behavior while cleaning field names.

## message schema_fact_3
The earlier before-tokenization rationale was wrong and should not be cited as final.

parts.text: {"answer":"src/parser/schema.ts trims field names after splitting/tokenizing so tokenization sees the raw schema text, preserving delimiter and quoted-field behavior, while still cleaning each parsed field name.","evidence":{"session_id":"schema_parser_session","blob_id":"schema_parser_session.md","message_id":"schema_fact_2"},"rationale":"The final correction says to tokenize first, then trim each field; the earlier idea to trim the whole schema header before tokenization was superseded and should not be treated as final.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["CSV trim cleanup","Network timeout parser","correction_chain_decoy_*"]}
